scenarios.title: Workflow Orchestration Platform
scenarios.when_to_read: Use for Apache Airflow user workflows, Dag authoring, local operations, providers, APIs, Helm, Docker, or Airflow monorepo contributions.
scenarios.role: Routes Airflow tasks to focused guidance for authoring, operations, providers, deployment, and contribution tooling.
scenarios.read_when: Apache Airflow, apache-airflow, airflow.sdk, Task SDK, Dag, airflow CLI, airflowctl, providers, Helm chart, Docker image, Breeze, prek, selective checks, Airflow repo.
scenarios.best_for: Writing or migrating Dags, debugging Airflow CLI/API/config issues, maintaining providers/extensions, planning official Helm/Docker deployments, and safely contributing to the Airflow monorepo.
scenarios.avoid_when: The task is only about a separate language SDK already covered by a more specific Java/Go/new-language SDK skill, or about a non-Airflow workflow orchestrator.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose by practical task: Dag code -> authoring-task-sdk; installed/running Airflow or APIs -> operations-cli-api; providers/extensions -> providers-extensions; Helm/Docker/Kubernetes -> deployment-helm-docker; repo edits/tests/PRs -> contribution-tooling.
